title: compact_cot.rs: ChatPayload::decode trusts caller verified subtype but no assert
description:
ChatPayload::decode() comment says 'data[0] is subtype (0x01), already verified by caller' but there's no debug_assert! to catch misuse. Either add the assertion or remove the comment (prefer the assertion for defense in depth).

File: rust/lichen-core/src/compact_cot.rs line 296
